_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs claude plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://claude.ai/* -> service claude.ai -> host-derived stem 'claude', which is CORRECT -> NO STEM_OVERRIDES entry). claude.ai is the EXACT origin Plan 38-01 classified SENSITIVE in extension/config/service-denylist.json, so the merge-time classifyGate sees a screened origin and does NOT abort. defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api/apiVoid transport helpers are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, claude-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node. backing:'dom' (the frozen conservative default) -> DOM-only routing; send_message is the sensitive AI-chat WRITE posture-B gates.
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-claude
